steps.title: Identify the character name the notes provide
steps.content: The notes tell us that Merle Oberon played Jill Baker in That Uncertain Feeling (1941). To specify her role in the film, we need to identify this character name.

steps.title: Find the choice that names this character
steps.content: C names the character she played—Jill Baker—in That Uncertain Feeling. The other choices either omit the character name, discuss her birth, or focus on her career progression without mentioning this film. That matches choice C — C is correct.
